pi_items.verified_value: Configuration requires enableAudioVoices=true AND/OR enableAudioEffects=true, not a single 'enableAudio' key
pi_items.source: GCompris ApplicationSettings.cpp source code shows two separate audio properties: enableAudioVoices and enableAudioEffects
GCompris ApplicationSettings.cpp default: filterLevelMin=1; Qt documentation confirms difficulty range 1-6
Task requires changing filterLevelMax from default 6 to 2. Verified via GCompris documentation and ApplicationSettings.cpp
GCompris ApplicationSettings.cpp shows property named 'virtualKeyboard' (not isVirtualKeyboard). Task requires enabling this setting.

GCompris main.cpp sets QApplication organization to 'KDE'. Qt QSettings documentation specifies path format: ~/.config/OrganizationName/ApplicationName.conf, resulting in ~/.config/KDE/gcompris-qt.conf
GCompris main.cpp sets organization='KDE', application='gcompris-qt'. Qt QSettings uses ~/.config/OrganizationName/ApplicationName.conf format on Linux

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic GCompris configuration task for preschoolers (ages 3-4). GCompris uses difficulty levels 1-6 stars; the task requires filtering to levels 1-2. The correct configuration file is at ~/.config/KDE/gcompris-qt.conf (not ~/.config/gcompris-qt/gcompris-qt.conf). Audio control uses two separate settings (enableAudioVoices and enableAudioEffects), not a single 'enableAudio' key. Virtual keyboard is controlled by the 'virtualKeyboard' setting. Default difficulty filter is 1-6; task changes maximum to 2. The verifier checks for these settings via configuration file inspection and requires the file to be modified during task execution.
